narrative_beat: Overhead de altar com tres elementos: pergaminho com sinais dourado, relogio parado monocromatico, coroa de espinhos rica. Luz vertical divina

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a dark stone altar viewed from directly above, with three sacred elements arranged in a triangle: an aged parchment inscribed with prophetic signs (foreground left, rich gold), a stopped pocket watch (right, desaturated grayscale), a crown of thorns (center-bottom, rich crimson-brown)
subject.focal_point: the parchment with prophetic signs glowing in amber-gold at the foreground
subject.secondary: vertical divine light column illuminating the altar center
props: aged parchment with handwritten prophetic signs
crown of thorns with deep crimson tones

composition.rule: triangular arrangement, divine light vertical centered
composition.foreground: parchment with prophetic signs in warm gold
composition.midground: crown of thorns in rich crimson-brown

lighting.key_light: vertical divine light beam from directly above centered on altar
lighting.rim_light: gold on parchment edges, crimson on thorns
lighting.shadow_quality: soft radial shadows emanating from center

style.post_processing: halation on divine beam, crushed blacks on altar edges, heavy grain, warm saturated triangle center
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, parchment fibers, metal patina on watch, thorns sharp details

symbolism.primary: the signs are real, the return is certain, the date belongs to God

negative_as_positive: photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
three-element triangle composition, divine light vertical
tack-sharp focus on parchment and crown

text_elements: handwritten aged ink symbols on parchment (illegible, decorative)

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Os sinais sao reais. A volta e certa. A data e de Deus.
